meaning: n.职员,官员,负责人员adj.机能的,职务的,作用的
examples: He raised his hands to the sky, then gestured toward a state functionary visiting his farm.
The book's hero, the Englishman Winston Smith, is a minor party functionary in one of these states.
Any judicial functionary who commits a crime mentioned in the preceding two paragraphs shall be given a heavier punishment.
Under Pope Benedict, Father Lombardi was a mere functionary who had no direct access to the pontiff.
In that moment when the functionary at BMW offered me any 3-series I wanted, I succumbed to maximalism.
